titleStmt.title: French historical newspaper corpus PressMint-FR [PressMint]
Corpus français de presse historique PressMint-FR [PressMint]

bibl.title: BnF/Gallica OCR data for Le Temps
Donnees OCR BnF/Gallica pour Le Temps

projectDesc.p: PressMint-FR is a French historical newspaper corpus produced from BnF METS/ALTO OCR data.

editorialDecl.p: OCR text is preserved without correction, except for whitespace normalisation and line-end hyphen handling.
Line-end hyphenation is resolved using ALTO SUBS_TYPE and SUBS_CONTENT attributes where available. Where not available, the hyphen is preserved.
ALTO TextBlocks are encoded as TEI paragraphs. No article or section divisions are inferred, because the source contains no logical structMap.
Page order is derived from the METS physical structMap ORDER attribute. ALTO PHYSICAL_IMG_NR is not used (it is 1 on all pages in this dataset).

ALTO String tokens are encoded as TEI <w> elements. Each <w> carries @facs referencing a Gallica IIIF image region for the word bounding box. OCR confidence is retained in the conversion model and omitted from strict PressMint TEI output. No <zone type='word'> is added to the facsimile to avoid file size inflation.
Image references use Gallica IIIF URLs because the master TIFF images are not included in the BnF package.

revisionDesc.change: Initial conversion from BnF METS/ALTO to PressMint TEI.
